subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the dominion of God, the Almighty, the All-Glorious, the All-Wise, wherein are decreed the measures of all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من جبروت الله المقتدر العزیز الحکیم و فیه قدر مقادیر کل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
